examples: Armenia lacks a seacoast or a port.
The small country has no seacoast, but is locked in by other nations.
The smell of sea salt in the air is a romanticized feature of life along a seacoast.
Born in Honfleur, Boudin didn't stray far from the English Channel seacoast until late-life travels to Venice and Istanbul.
Saturday morning's high tide sent waves crashing into closed roads along the seacoast, local police said, but there were no reports of significant damage.
